overall.description: A first-person perspective from inside a vertical transit elevator ascending through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The journey begins at street level with neon-lit pedestrians visible outside, then rapidly climbs past holographic billboards and glass skyscrapers bathed in teal and magenta neon light, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

events.description: elevator begins ascending from ground level platform

agents.ego_description: standing inside elevator looking out at platform while waiting for departure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white outfit standing on platform facing the elevator
pedestrian in red outfit standing on platform looking away

entered.detail: large cyan neon sign with text 'DE & SAGAN' visible through the glass
metal and glass structure of the elevator cabin with vertical support beams
concrete platform floor visible outside the elevator at ground level
horizontal pink neon light strips on the right side of the platform

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a glass elevator at ground level in a cyberpunk city. Two pedestrians stand on the concrete platform outside—one in white facing the elevator, another in red looking away. Cyan and pink neon signs illuminate the semi-enclosed platform. Around the 6-second mark, the elevator begins its upward departure.

events.description: passing close to building facade with large vertical 'SECHO' signage

agents.ego_description: rapidly ascending through the city in the elevator, observing passing buildings

entered.detail: tall building with vertical white 'SECHO' lettering and red textured panels
large curved pink neon light structures on adjacent building
modern glass building with illuminated windows visible in the distance
digital advertisement screen showing animated content

segments.scene_description: The elevator accelerates upward through a narrow shaft between futuristic buildings. The SECHO building with its distinctive vertical signage passes by on the right, while curved pink neon structures glow on the left. The ground platform disappears below as the cabin climbs through the lower levels of the cityscape.

events.description: emerging from enclosed shaft into open panoramic view of the city skyline
passing through area with dense holographic advertisements and city lights

agents.ego_description: continuing high-speed ascent with expansive views of the illuminated city below

entered.detail: large holographic projection of a woman's face with 'CYBERHUB' text above
expansive view of numerous skyscrapers with illuminated windows stretching to the horizon
multiple floating holographic advertisements in various colors
tall building with distinctive red circular logo near the top

segments.scene_description: The elevator breaks through into open air, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of the cyberpunk city at night. A massive holographic face with 'CYBERHUB' text floats beside the cabin. The city sprawls below with countless lights, floating advertisements, and towering skyscrapers with glowing red logos visible against the dark sky.

events.description: passing very close to concrete building facade with vertical neon signage

agents.ego_description: continuing ascent through upper building levels, passing close to structures

entered.detail: close-up view of concrete building exterior with geometric patterns
vertical green neon sign with 'KARA' text running down the building
mechanical equipment and structures visible on building rooftops
industrial building facade with ventilation grates and horizontal lines

segments.scene_description: The elevator enters the upper building levels, passing close to concrete facades and industrial structures. A vertical green 'KARA' neon sign slides by on the right. The open skyline gives way to enclosed building exteriors with ventilation grates and rooftop equipment as the cabin approaches its destination.

events.description: elevator slows down and begins alignment with destination floor
arriving at Ellison Plaza station, view stabilizes on destination platform

agents.ego_description: slowing to a stop at the destination floor, preparing to exit

entered.detail: concrete platform of Ellison Plaza station coming into view
dark metal walls of the elevator shaft interior
illuminated signage and floor indicators visible at destination

segments.scene_description: The elevator decelerates as it approaches Ellison Plaza station. The view transitions from passing buildings to the dark interior of the elevator shaft, then aligns with the destination platform. The cabin comes to a complete stop, with concrete platform and arrival signage visible through the glass, completing the vertical journey through Night City.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vertical ascent from a neon-lit street level into the sprawling heights of a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis. It begins inside a glass elevator at ground level, where cyan and pink signs illuminate pedestrians on a concrete platform before the cabin departs upward. As the elevator accelerates, the view shifts to a narrow shaft flanked by the SECHO building and curved pink neon structures, eventually breaking into the open air to reveal a panoramic skyline dominated by a massive holographic face and glowing red logos. The scene then transitions back toward enclosed building exteriors, passing a green KARA sign and industrial ventilation grates as the cabin climbs through the upper levels. Finally, the elevator decelerates and enters a dark shaft before aligning with the concrete platform of Ellison Plaza station to complete the journey.
